user.title: TRMNL HA Climate Connector
user.description: Paste the webhook URL from your TRMNL plugin's Settings page (Plugins → your plugin → Webhook URL).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the webhook URL. Check that it is correct and that TRMNL is reachable.

abort.already_configured: This webhook URL is already configured.

init.title: Display & Push Settings
init.description: Show 24-hour sensor history charts alongside current values. Requires the HA Recorder integration.

data_description.area_filter: Leave empty to chart all areas. Current sensor values always show all areas.
data_description.chart_sensor_types: Leave empty to chart all sensor types. Selecting fewer reduces chart clutter.
data_description.chart_hours: How many hours of history to show.
data_description.push_interval: How often data is sent to your TRMNL device.
